site.title: Themadhood's Photos
site.tagline: Photography and visual imagery under Themadhood Media.
site.metaDescription: Themadhood's Photos is the photography branch under Themadhood Media, focused on visual sets, collections, and project documentation.

footer.title: Themadhood's Photos
footer.line2: Themadhood's Photos operates under Themadhood Media.

hero.headline: Themadhood's Photos
body: Themadhood's Photos is the photography and imagery branch within Themadhood Media.
It exists to create, curate, and publish visual collections while keeping projects organized within the larger Themadhood ecosystem.

about.title: ABOUT US
body: This branch focuses on photography, visual sets, project documentation, and curated collections.
When a project does not maintain its own public presence, releases and updates can route through the parent media structure while staying properly attributed.

contact.title: CONNECT WITH US
contact.note: GitHub Pages is static-only. If you want submissions, wire this up to Formspree/Netlify Forms later.
